title: Shershavy
description: This mod adds a lot of different content. A variety of mobs, small and large structures, various mechanics such as magic and an anti-aircraft system, many new decorative and functional blocks, and more.
body:
![Shershavy](https://bobophones.github.io/img/logo/shershavy.png)

# This mod adds a lot of different content
A variety of mobs, small and large structures, various mechanics such as magic and an anti-aircraft system, many new decorative and functional blocks, and more.

In Shershavy you can find structures such as:
- Sugar castle: the place where the living blocks live

![Sugar castle & sugar blocklings](https://bobophones.github.io/img/screenshot/shershavy_4.png)

- Basalt village: фn underground village made of basalt inhabited by cool skeletons

![Basalt village](https://bobophones.github.io/img/screenshot/shershavy_5.png)

- Mage's house: a large mushroom in which an old mage has settled

![Mage's house](https://bobophones.github.io/img/screenshot/shershavy_6.png)

In this mod, you can become a mage and cast spells that can be found in dungeons or buy from a mage and research it on the magic table

![Magic](https://bobophones.github.io/img/screenshot/shershavy_8.png)

Or you can become an engineer and create things like anti-aircraft system and vehicles (so far there is only a tractor)

![Anti-aircraft system](https://bobophones.github.io/img/screenshot/shershavy_2.png)
![Tractor](https://bobophones.github.io/img/screenshot/shershavy_7.png)

There are also many decorative blocks here

![Decor](https://bobophones.github.io/img/screenshot/shershavy_3.png)
